package rulefixtures

import (
	"time"
)

// scenario for time_newtimer_inside_loop: `time.NewTimer(...)` inside loops.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
func scenario683Negative(items []string) int {
	started := time.Now()
	total := 0
	for _, item := range items {
		if !started.IsZero() { total += len(item) }
	}
	return total
}
